title: Scupper Bantoo

The '''''Scupper Bantoo''''' was a [[CorelliSpace]] [[Gymsnor-2 light freighter]] operated by the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Maddie Macatten]] in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]]. Battered and considered to be an obsolete design by [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] formerly belonged to Macatten's [[Maddie Macatten's master|enslaver]]. When her master was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] [[Sanhedrim ship|ship]] while on a [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] junket, Macatten took the craft from its [[Hangar/Legends|dock]] on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. Macatten used the ''Scupper Bantoo'' to supply the colonies of the Kathol Outback with replacement parts and luxury items, as well as to track down information regarding the Aing-Tii.

==Description==
The ''Scupper Bantoo'' was a modified [[Gymsnor-2 light freighter]] built by [[CorelliSpace]], measuring 31.7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length. It only required a crew of one and could carry four passengers. The vessel had a hold that could carry eighty-two [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, as well as two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] worth of consumables. A Class Three [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] propelled the ''Scupper Bantoo'' through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], with a Class Fourteen module as a backup. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] could achieve speeds of up to 750 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The vessel was also mounted with one heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]].<ref name="ko" />

==History==
The ''Scupper Bantoo'' was owned by a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Maddie Macatten's master|master]] and [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] who was based on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. He attempted to keep the ship modernized, but the vessel had been considered obsolete since [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], and there was only so much he could do to improve the ship. When he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by an [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] [[Sanhedrim ship|ship]] while on a trading expedition, the vessel was acquired by his slave, the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Maddie Macatten]]. The Aing-Tii were known to despise slavers, and would often attack their ships when they encountered them. Macatten then took the ownership papers and simply flew the vessel out of the [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] in which it was berthed.<ref name="ko" />

Striking out for the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]], Macatten used the ''Scupper Bantoo'' as a [[Free-trader|merchant]] vessel, trading machine parts and luxury goods between the various colonies she found. She, too, attempted to modernize the vessel with new modifications, but found the same problem as her former master did—the ship was too old and could only take so much tweaking. While she plied the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], Macatten also used the vessel as a mobile base to search for information regarding the Aing-Tii, whom she wished to personally thank for freeing her.<ref name="ko" />

==Owners and operators==
The ''Scupper Bantoo'' had at least two owners in its operational life. The first, a merchant based on Kal'Shebbol, owned the vessel until his death at the hands of the Aing-Tii. One of his slaves, Maddie Macatten, took the opportunity to steal the vessel shortly after, operating the vessel alone.<ref name="ko" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Scupper Bantoo'' was introduced in ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'', a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying]] supplement for [[The DarkStryder Campaign (series)|''The DarkStryder Campaign'']], published by [[West End Games]].
